name: applyflow
description: ApplyFlow MVP skeleton - semi-automatic job search execution agent

scripts.validate:all: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run validate:schema && npm run validate:contamination && npm run validate:fixtures && npm run validate:ui-boundary && npm run validate:ui-recovery-guard && npm run validate:ui-route-smoke && npm run validate:ui-dirty-data-smoke && npm run validate:ui-runtime-smoke && npm run validate:ui-user-flow-smoke && npm run validate:discovery-contracts && npm run validate:discovery-lead-ingestion && npm run validate:discovery-feishu-adapter && npm run validate:discovery-feishu-sync && npm run validate:discovery-offline-json-adapter && npm run validate:discovery-offline-json-jobs-seed && npm run validate:job-scoring-derived-view && npm run validate:job-llm-scoring-layer && npm run validate:discovery-dedup && npm run validate:discovery-batch-decision && npm run validate:discovery-ranking && npm run validate:discovery-shortlist && npm run validate:discovery-admission && npm run validate:discovery-fullchain-e2e && npm run validate:execution-contracts && npm run validate:execution-e2e && npm run validate:browser-apply-skeleton && npm run validate:browser-generic-html-form && npm run validate:browser-apply-ui && npm run validate:resume-export-contracts && npm run validate:resume-export-mapping && npm run validate:resume-docx-export && npm run validate:resume-pdf-export && npm run validate:export-e2e && npm run validate:master-resume-read && npm run validate:master-resume-save && npm run validate:master-resume-tailoring-source && npm run validate:prep-resume-readiness && npm run validate:jobs-apply-ui && npm run validate:autofill-profile-structure && npm run validate:profile-autofill-enhanced-ui && npm run validate:layout-ia && npm run validate:edge-extension-mvp && npm run validate:edge-semantic-slots && npm run validate:edge-autofill-regression && npm run validate:edge-multi-segment-passive
scripts.cf:d1:execute:schema:local: wrangler d1 execute APPLYFLOW_DB --config wrangler.jsonc --file cloudflare/d1/schema.sql
scripts.cf:d1:execute:seed:local: wrangler d1 execute APPLYFLOW_DB --config wrangler.jsonc --file cloudflare/d1/seed.sql
scripts.cf:d1:execute:schema:remote: wrangler d1 execute APPLYFLOW_DB --config wrangler.jsonc --remote --file cloudflare/d1/schema.sql
scripts.cf:d1:execute:seed:remote: wrangler d1 execute APPLYFLOW_DB --config wrangler.jsonc --remote --file cloudflare/d1/seed.sql
scripts.cf:d1:execute:schema:staging: wrangler d1 execute APPLYFLOW_DB --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging --remote --file cloudflare/d1/schema.sql
scripts.cf:d1:execute:seed:staging: wrangler d1 execute APPLYFLOW_DB --config wrangler.jsonc --env staging --remote --file cloudflare/d1/seed.sql
scripts.validate:all:fast: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run build && npm run validate:schema && npm run validate:contamination && npm run validate:fixtures && npm run validate:ui-boundary && npm run validate:ui-recovery-guard && npm run validate:ui-route-smoke && npm run validate:ui-dirty-data-smoke && npm run validate:discovery-contracts && npm run validate:discovery-lead-ingestion && npm run validate:discovery-feishu-adapter && npm run validate:discovery-feishu-sync && npm run validate:discovery-offline-json-adapter && npm run validate:job-scoring-derived-view && npm run validate:discovery-dedup && npm run validate:discovery-batch-decision && npm run validate:discovery-ranking && npm run validate:discovery-shortlist && npm run validate:discovery-admission && npm run validate:execution-contracts && npm run validate:browser-apply-skeleton && npm run validate:browser-generic-html-form && npm run validate:browser-apply-ui && npm run validate:resume-export-contracts && npm run validate:resume-export-mapping && npm run validate:resume-docx-export && npm run validate:resume-pdf-export && npm run validate:master-resume-read && npm run validate:master-resume-save && npm run validate:master-resume-tailoring-source && npm run validate:prep-resume-readiness && npm run validate:jobs-apply-ui && npm run validate:autofill-profile-structure && npm run validate:profile-autofill-enhanced-ui && npm run validate:layout-ia && npm run validate:edge-extension-mvp && npm run validate:edge-semantic-slots && npm run validate:edge-autofill-regression && npm run validate:edge-multi-segment-passive
scripts.validate:all:release: npm run validate:all && npm run validate:ui-key-path-playwright && npm run validate:job-preference-eval-seed && npm run eval:job-preference-ranking:acceptance
